summary: Stage-focused decomp/matching PR split from #2345, claiming five stage-related 100% function matches and touching 44 files across stage, fighter, game-mode, library, toy/list, and video code. The strongest PR-body evidence names matches in grkinokoroute.c, gricemt.c, grhomerun.c, grpushon.c, and groldkongo.c; review focused on questionable local extern/__FILE__ handling, an LObj helper macro duplication, possible loop structure in a weighted-random picker, and pad-field naming.

key_files.role: PR body claims grKinokoRoute_8020836C reached 100%; changed 25 added/27 deleted across 2 hunks.
PR body claims fn_801F9038 reached 100%; bot report records one new match for main/melee/gr/gricemt fn_801F9038.
PR body claims grHomeRun_8021EC58 reached 100%; changed 15 added/12 deleted across 2 hunks.
PR body claims grPushOn_802190D0 reached 100%; large function/data work for stage lighting; reviewer questioned a local HSD_LObjGetType definition that duplicates an existing lobj.c function name.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md: Matches table and grPushOn description

key_files.role: PR body claims grOldKongo_80210650 reached 100%; reviewer questioned local extern/__FILE__ machinery, suggested possible loop form, and suggested x1C_pad-style naming for unused padding.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md: Matches table and grOldKongo description

key_files.role: Introduced GmRouteCallback typedef and included platform.h.
Replaced raw bool (*)(s32) route callback signatures with GmRouteCallback.
Header prototypes updated to use GmRouteCallback.
Static struct callback field updated to GmRouteCallback.
Formatting alignment changes around Fighter_804D64FC_t field comments.
Formatting of queue array/comment declarations in Fighter_x1A88_t.
Include-order and formatting churn around Fighter_804D64FC casts and CPU attack code.
Largest changed file by metadata: 338 added/315 deleted across 12 hunks; exact semantic change not visible in loaded excerpt.

Additional changed files listed by metadata: src/melee/ft/chara/ftCommon/ftCo_Attack100.h, src/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_Init.c, src/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialNYs.c, src/melee/ft/ft_084E.c, src/melee/ft/ft_0C31.h, src/melee/gm/gm_16F1.c, src/melee/gm/gm_18A5.c, src/melee/gm/gmcamera.c, src/melee/gm/gmcamera.static.h, src/melee/gm/gmclassic.c, src/melee/gr/forward.h, src/melee/gr/grfourside.c, src/melee/gr/grhomerun.h, src/melee/gr/gricemt.h, src/melee/gr/grkinokoroute.h, src/melee/gr/grkongo.c, src/melee/gr/grmaterial.c, src/melee/gr/ground.c, src/melee/gr/grpura.c, src/melee/gr/grshrineroute.c, src/melee/gr/grshrineroute.h, src/melee/lb/lbarq.c, src/melee/ty/toy.c, src/melee/ty/tylist.c, src/melee/vi/vi1201v2.c, src/sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_3AA7.c, src/sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_3AA7.h, src/sysdolphin/baselib/sobjlib.c, src/sysdolphin/baselib/sobjlib.h, src/sysdolphin/baselib/synth.c, src/sysdolphin/baselib/texpdag.c.

what_changed: PR body says the work was split from #2345 and scoped to stage-related 100% matches only.
PR body lists five claimed 100% function matches: grKinokoRoute_8020836C, fn_801F9038, grHomeRun_8021EC58, grPushOn_802190D0, and grOldKongo_80210650.
grPushOn_802190D0 work added stage lighting setup code with HSD_LightDesc/static light-config evidence in the PR body and local HSD_LObjGetType macro in the reviewed hunk.
grOldKongo_80210650 work implemented a weighted-random selector over eight counters and angle constants; reviewed hunk shows nested decrement/if chain and HSD_ASSERT(786, 0).
gm route callback signatures were factored into a GmRouteCallback typedef in gm/forward.h and used in gm_1601.c, gm_1601.h, and gm_1601.static.h.
Several non-stage files show include-order, line wrapping, cast-spacing, and comment-alignment churn in the diff excerpt.
The loaded bot report, apparently early in the PR, recorded fn_801F9038 as one new match, grpushon .data and grPushOn_802190D0 as improvements, and groldkongo .sdata/.sdata2 regressions.

smart_moves.text: The PR body explicitly narrowed scope to stage-related matches and listed dropped #2345 items, including already-upstream work and a reverted 99.64% function with real struct-field offset diffs.
Factoring a repeated function-pointer type into GmRouteCallback improved signature consistency across forward declarations, prototypes, and a static struct field.

The grOldKongo implementation kept address-style constant names instead of inventing semantic names for sdata2 angle constants, matching conservative naming when semantics are only partially evidenced.
evidence_refs: review_comments.md: groldkongo hunk with grOk_804DBA04-style externs

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a repeated weighted-selection chain subtracts adjacent fields and tests for negative, reviewers may ask whether it can be expressed as a natural loop; if it must remain unrolled for matching, keep the reason/evidence explicit.

Local helper macros or definitions that share a name with an existing library function need explanation, especially when they are used for inline/codegen reasons but do not behave exactly like the existing function.
Assert filename tricks using #undef __FILE__ and data-symbol-backed file strings are review-sensitive; reviewers may ask whether the machinery is truly used or removable.

PR-scoped match claims can diverge from early bot report snapshots; retain both the author's claimed final scope and the specific report evidence rather than treating a single report as final validation.

naming_conventions.text: Unused padding fields should preferably be named with pad-style names such as x1C_pad when their only evidenced role is padding.
Use a typedef such as GmRouteCallback for a callback signature reused across multiple declarations and struct fields.
Address-style names such as fn_801F9038 and grOk_804DBA04 remained where stronger semantic naming evidence was not shown in the loaded slice.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Nested subtract-and-test chain used for grOldKongo_80210650 weighted random selection; reviewer suggested a possible for-loop but allowed matching shape if loop recovery was not pursued.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: May preserve generated-looking repeated structure unless natural loop forms were tried.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Local HSD_LObjGetType macro/definition used inside grPushOn_802190D0 despite an existing lobj.c function of similar name.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Can confuse function-vs-macro semantics and should be commented if required for inlining/codegen.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Local externs for sdata2 constants and __FILE__ override in groldkongo.c to support HSD_ASSERT/file-name behavior.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Reviewer questioned whether the block was used and whether it could be removed.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: The PR body explicitly reverted grKinokoRoute_80207B5C because it was only 99.64% and had real struct-field offset diffs.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Shows restraint: avoid landing near-matches when remaining diffs indicate real type/field issues.

review_feedback.author: jurrejelle
review_feedback.feedback: Questioned whether the local extern/__FILE__ block was used and suggested removing it if not.

review_feedback.author: jurrejelle
review_feedback.feedback: Suggested the weighted-random subtract chain might be expressible as a for loop, while noting it was acceptable if matching and the author did not want to pursue it.

review_feedback.author: jurrejelle
review_feedback.feedback: Asked why an HSD_LObjGetType definition was created when a function exists in lobj.c; requested clarification if used for inline reasons because the same name does not do exactly the same thing.

review_feedback.author: jurrejelle
review_feedback.feedback: Suggested renaming unused split padding fields to x1C_pad-style names; explicitly said it was not 100% needed but good practice.

review_feedback.author: jurrejelle
review_feedback.feedback: Review summary said only the __FILE__ and LObj issues were hard requirements/questions; loop and padding comments were suggestions.

follow_up_queries: grOldKongo_80210650 weighted random loop natural loop
grpushon light_configs HSD_LightDesc nine point lights

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, state, changed-file counts
human_pr_text.md: PR body, match claims, dropped items
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report and review summary
notes: The raw diff is truncated in the loaded slice; file-level changed-file metadata is complete, but semantic detail is only visible for part of the diff.

The PR body claims five 100% matches, while the loaded bot report snapshot records only one new match and grPushOn_802190D0 at 93.16% plus data regressions; this intake does not infer final validation beyond the supplied evidence.
Review comments identify hard questions for __FILE__ and LObj handling, but the loaded slice does not show the resolution of those comments.
Some PR body descriptions are explicitly framed as 'What Claude thinks these functions do'; they are useful search context but weaker than direct diff or reviewer evidence for accepted semantics.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Clarify local helper definitions that duplicate existing helper names
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2404, a reviewer questioned a local HSD_LObjGetType definition in grpushon.c because a function with that name exists in lobj.c and the local definition did not behave exactly the same; if retained for inline/codegen reasons, the reviewer wanted clarification.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Try natural loops for repeated weighted-selection chains, but record matching constraints
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2404, a reviewer noted that the grOldKongo_80210650 subtract/test chain might be a for loop, though not a hard requirement if the matched shape could not be improved.

source_update_candidates.title: Local macro/function name collisions should be justified
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding guidance that a local macro or inline definition should not silently reuse the name of an existing helper/function with different semantics; if needed for matching, comment the codegen reason and keep the scope narrow.
source_update_candidates.reason: Reviewer treated the duplicate HSD_LObjGetType naming/semantics issue as one of the hard questions in this PR.

source_update_candidates.title: Pad-field naming for clearly unused padding
source_update_candidates.text: Consider documenting that split or resized unused byte fields should use pad-style names such as x1C_pad when the evidence only supports padding, while not over-interpreting unknown fields.
source_update_candidates.reason: Reviewer called x1C_pad-style naming good practice, though explicitly not a hard requirement.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the PR body's AI-authored function descriptions as accepted semantic facts without corroborating source/diff evidence.
Do not treat the loaded bot report as final validation for all five claimed matches; it appears to be a snapshot and conflicts with the later PR title/body.
Do not create an accepted standard that nested weighted-random chains must always be converted to loops; review said the loop idea was only a suggestion and acceptable to leave if matching.
